configurePresets.name: ninja
configurePresets.description: Ninja generator with clang-cl; emits compile_commands.json for clangd. PCH ON by default: heavy/stable headers (Eigen, gtest, atx-core vocab) are parsed once, not once per TU — this is the fast cold/fresh-build path. Include-hygiene enforcement (strict per-TU includes) moved to the `hygiene` preset for CI/nightly. Run from a VS Developer shell or via the VSCode CMake Tools extension so the MSVC environment is present.

configurePresets.name: hygiene
configurePresets.displayName: Ninja + clang-cl, PCH OFF (include hygiene / CI nightly)
configurePresets.description: Strict build: PCH OFF so every TU compiles with its own includes, catching any missing/unused include the PCH would otherwise mask. Slower (full per-TU header re-parse) — run on CI/nightly, not for local iteration.

configurePresets.name: dev
configurePresets.displayName: Ninja + clang-cl + sccache + shared deps (fast iterate)
configurePresets.description: Fast iterative preset for worktrees: sccache compiler cache (cross-worktree object-cache hits for third-party AND first-party) + a shared FetchContent clone/build cache via $env{ATX_DEPS_DIR} (deps cloned once, reused by every worktree). CMP0141=NEW forces embedded debug info (/Z7) so debug objects are sccache-cacheable (the repo's top-level cmake_minimum_required is 3.20, which would otherwise leave CMP0141 OLD and /Zi PDBs uncacheable). Prereqs: run from a VS Developer shell, sccache on PATH, ATX_DEPS_DIR set (see scripts/dev-setup.md).

configurePresets.name: vs
configurePresets.description: Multi-config MSBuild generator for the VS IDE / msbuild CLI.
